title: Into The Wild: Realism ModPack
body:
RealismCraft has been a hot topic in the past couple of months, arguably the most beautiful add-on of all time.

I couldn't help but notice many similarities between said add-on and some Java mods, so, as you may expect, I tried my best to recreate the add-on in Java Edition.

This mod pack will offer many, but not all features on the RealismCraft add-on, providing a very enjoyable, customizable, and most important of all, free Minecraft modding experience, similar to that add-on.

I also tried to add more mods, nothing irrelevant though, just some miscellaneous features to improve upon the mod pack, in the future more mods will be included to improve the RealismCraft Java Recreation mod pack, along with pushing it closer to the bedrock add-on.

The mod pack isn't resource-intensive and includes less than 100 mods, though I'd recommend not enabling shaders unless you want a screenshot, the FPS with shaders is not very good due to the bushy leaves on one of the resource packs.

Here's a long-form video describing each project that went into the making of this mod pack, I'd recommend watching, so that you get a better idea of what you're playing, may also help you identify issues that may arise:
